heading: Highlighting
body:
You can [highlights](highlight-ref) on fields if the fields are
indexed under a parent field of [document](bson-data-types-document) type for query predicates specified inside
the `embeddedDocument` operator. For an example, see [How to Run MongoDB Search Queries Against Fields in Embedded Documents](embedded-documents-tutorial).

To learn about the `embeddedDocument` operator limitations, see
[embeddedDocument Operator Limitations](embedded-document-query-limitations).
